signInSubtitle: Sign in to join or create a match.
signUpSubtitle: Create your account to start player onboarding.
signUpGoogleSecurityNote: Google is recommended for security and ease of use, but you can also use your email.
signUpWhatsAppRequiredNote: Add your phone at signup and confirm it in one click during onboarding (free, no SMS).
gmailRequiredError: Use a Gmail account (@gmail.com) to create your Kifpadel profile.
useGoogleSignUpHint: Email signup is disabled. Use Google sign-in with a Gmail account.
phoneSignupHint: 8 digits (Tunisia). Confirm your number during onboarding.
displayNameSignupHint: Shown to other players during matches.
genderSignupHint: Required to join men-only, women-only, or mixed matches.
invalidGenderError: Please select your gender (male or female).
phoneInUseError: This number is already linked to another Kifpadel account. Sign in with that account or use a different number.
authNetworkError: Connection interrupted. Check your network and try again.
invalidCredentialsError: Invalid credentials. Please check your email and password.
emailNotConfirmedError: Your email is not confirmed yet. Please check your inbox and try again.
resendActivationSuccess: A new confirmation email has been sent.
resendActivationError: Could not resend the email right now.
callbackFailedError: The confirmation link is invalid or expired. Please request a new confirmation email.
missingFieldsError: Please provide email, password, phone number, and gender.
signUpFailedError: Unable to create account right now.
userExistsError: An account already exists with this email. Please sign in or reset your password.
invalidRedirectUrlError: Invalid signup configuration. Please contact the administrator.
profileTriggerError: User profile creation failed in the database. Run the SQL fix for the signup trigger.
authConfigError: Invalid authentication configuration (Supabase keys or project). Check Vercel environment variables.
rateLimitedError: Too many attempts. Please wait a minute and try again.
weakPasswordError: Password is too weak. Use at least 8 characters with letters and numbers.
invalidEmailError: Invalid email address. Check the format and try again.
botProtectionError: Security verification required. Please try again in a few seconds.
serviceUnavailableError: Signup service is temporarily unavailable. Please retry in 1 minute.
checkEmailInfo: Account created. Please check your email to confirm signup.
emailConfirmedSignInHint: Your email is verified. Sign in with your password to continue player onboarding.
passwordUpdatedInfo: Password updated. You can now sign in.
